title: Spiced Egyptian Chicken Casserole
description: A flavorful and aromatic casserole dish featuring chicken, spices, and a medley of Middle Eastern flavors.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove chicken from skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add diced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in spiced egyptian seasoning, casserole rice, diced tomatoes, and chicken broth.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked chicken, rice mixture, and feta cheese. Mix well.
Transfer mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with chopped parsley.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
